modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook email is offline and not syncing properly.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to check my emails in Outlook, and suddenly it says I'm working offline. I noticed there's this annoying red X on the icon, and my emails just won't download or sync at all. It's super frustrating because I rely on it for work, and now I can't see any new messages or updates.
short_description: Outlook email is offline and not syncing properly.
description: So, I was just trying to check my emails in Outlook, and suddenly it says I'm working offline. I noticed there's this annoying red X on the icon, and my emails just won't download or sync at all. It's super frustrating because I rely on it for work, and now I can't see any new messages or updates.
